overview: Crazy Bot 4.0 is a web chat app powered by the Groq LLM API with Wikipedia fallback. Each device gets its own isolated chat history. API keys are secured in the backend and never exposed to users.
features: Multi-screen app: Splash, Info, Chat, Settings, Help
IP-based device isolation for chat history
Groq LLM API integration with 4-key rotation
Wikipedia fallback when bot doesn't know the answer
Custom bot and user avatars matching original Kivy design
Per-device settings: name, font size, chat background color
